in_game_description: A Lysorian bullpup assault rifle. One of the two main variants, both were accepted into the Lysorian military in the late 1978s and are being phased out slowly with the STG-527. name: FAMAS F1
in_game_description: A Lysorian bullpup assault rifle. One of the two main variants, both were accepted into the Lysorian military in the late 1978s and are being phased out slowly with the STG-527. The FAMAS F1 uses a proprietary 25-round magazine with Lysorian made ammo and a smaller trigger guard. It is the slowest firing variant but hits the hardest. Burst fire reduces recoil by 20% and increases RPM by 100! Model submitted by Mysterious Modeler X.

name: QBZ-95
in_game_description: A shift from earlier Novaruss-inspired designs, the QBZ-95 represents the People's Republic of Jinhan's first domestically developed family of small arms for the new 5.8x42mm round. The design includes a distinctive foregrip positioned just ahead of the pistol grip, improving handling during automatic fire. While the bullpup layout offers compactness, the QBZ-95 lacks modularity for mounting accessories - often requiring aftermarket kits to use them.

name: L86A2 LSW
in_game_description: A heavyweight squad weapon variant as part of the SA80 family! The increased barrel length and bipod gives this weapon improved accuracy, increased muzzle velocity and greater effective range. It was withdrawn in 2019 after being confirmed the L86 would not receive further upgrades. Increased fire rate with high damage, penetration and bullet speed but suffers from heavy weight and a slow reload time. Model submitted by Mysterious Modeler X.

in_game_description: The AK-12BR (for "Balanced Recoil") is a 5.45x39mm AK-12 prototype using a BARS system and a highly unconventional 'snail' drum magazine. No known developments of the AK-12s with BARS exists, and the AK-12 prototypes were abandoned long before any such development could've taken place. High rate of fire and incredible gun stability, but very low damage.

Large magazine capacity making for lengthy reloads. Model submitted by Mysterious Modeler X.

Intended as a continuation of the AK-9 development, previous prototypes of this rifle were based on the AKS-74U and later the AK-104. Ultimately, it was shelved along with the rest of the pre-production AK-12s. High damaging especially in close range, but held back by a relatively below average magazine capacity.

overview: Rank Required:

in_game_description: A pick designed for cutting into packed ice, useful for scaling cliffs and glaciers alike. It might have been used by a free man once, in another timeline. Longer range.
overview: Rank Required:

in_game_description: A small axe useful for surviving in the wilderness, even after your plane goes down. Maybe it's time you bury the hatchet with your opponent. Fast swing time with shorter range.
overview: Rank Required:

in_game_description: A Swiss army knife with many useful tools one could flip out for any number of situations. Tiny blade, fast speed. Halloween 2020 melee.
overview: Rank Required:

overview: Rank Required:

in_game_description: A traditional machete with a lot of history and its fair share of combat. All you need now is a hockey mask. Functionally identical to the Machete. Chh-chh-chh, ahh-ahh-ahh...

name: Bridal Brandisher
overview: Rank Required:

overview: Rank Required:

in_game_description: The power of god and anime is on your side. Mass produced carbon sword with minimal design to optimize results. The quick stab is a simple punch, don't question why it is as powerful as the blade swings. Model by Vic
overview: Rank Required:

overview: Rank Required:

overview: Rank Required:

overview: Rank Required:

name: Krampus Kukri

The accursed blade sings gently like the higurashi, carrying on its tune the curse of a girl who turned her back on her friends as she was overcome by madness. It remains possessed by that fragment of misery to this day.
overview: Rank Required:

in_game_description: Find your ninja way and defeat your foes. These were utilized by ninjas in ancient times both as close combat weapons as well as throwing knives. Sadly your training only allows the former. Short range, quick attacks. Believe it!

overview: Rank Required:

name: Sledge Hammer

overview: Rank Required:

name: Warhammer
in_game_description: Forged by the blacksmiths of the middle east, this warhammer has been through countless battles. Treat it right, and it'll treat you right.

overview: Rank Required:

name: Present

name: Crane (Weapon)
in_game_description: A special reward for a limited-time-only event. A gigantic toy replica of the Crane. Campers sold separately.
overview: Rank Required:

name: M67 Frag
overview: Rank Required:

name: MK 2 Frag
in_game_description: An iconic American grenade renowned for looking like a pineapple. Due to shrapnel it is very powerful in close range. However, like bullets, damage drops off in range, and the shrapnel behaves a lot like that
overview: Rank Required:

name: M24 Stick
overview: Rank Required:

name: M26 Frag
in_game_description: An American grenade that saw use in the Korean War and preceded the M67 grenade. Featuring similar performance, however slightly less throwing speed
overview: Rank Required:

name: M560 Mini
in_game_description: An American mini-grenade by Accuracy Systems. It was intended to serve as a modern replacement to the then popular V40 mini-grenade. However, this series was short lived. Fast throw speed and reasonable blast radius
overview: Rank Required:

name: V40 Mini
overview: Rank Required:

name: Roly HG
in_game_description: ANTI, BRING FORTH THE ROLY HAND GRENADE. First shalt thou take out the Roly Pin. Then shalt thou count to three, no more, no less. Three shall be the number thou shalt count, and the number of the counting shalt be three. Four shalt thou count not, neither count thou two, excepting that thou then proceed to three. Five is right out. Once the number three, being the third number, be reached, then lobbest thou thy Roly Hand Grenade of Crane Site towards thy foe, who, being naughty in My sight, shall snuff it [sic]
overview: Rank Required:

name: Dynamite
in_game_description: An explosive developed for mining in the late 1800's, not to be confused with TNT. Average fuse time but it is awkward to throw given you have to light it first, poor killing distance but good overall blast radius.
overview: Rank Required:

name: Dynamite-3
in_game_description: A bundle of three sticks of dynamite, a personal choice of coyotes and animated characters. Features a reasonably large blast radius and throwing distance.
overview: Rank Required:

name: RGD-5 HE
overview: Rank Required:

name: Semtex
in_game_description: An explosive device which will stick to surfaces when thrown. Reasonable blast radius and fuse time, however it definitely will be noticeable by enemies
overview: Rank Required:

name: PB Grenade
in_game_description: Ok. We'll stay away from the cars *clunk* *car alarm goes off* ....whoops.... [sic] The PB Grenade [sic] is great for clearing objectives, but comes with the caveat of only carrying one of them. Large Explosion Radius with a 8 second fuse, giving ample time for you and your enemies to get away! I hear there is a helicopter coming to rescue us survivors from Mercy Hospital... [sic]
overview: Rank Required:

name: Bundle Charge
overview: Rank Required:

name: T-13 Impact
in_game_description: A small baseball shaped grenade that detonates on impact with a hard surface. Doesn't do a lot of damage, but you can carry a lot of them and throw them very far.
overview: Rank Required:

name: RGN UDZS
in_game_description: A Soviet era hand grenade featuring the UDSZ dual action fuse. This allows it to be both a standard fragmentation grenade and an impact grenade. It was designed to work in tandem with the RGD-5 High explosive grenade and to be used as an offensive grenade
overview: Rank Required:

name: RGO UDZS
in_game_description: A Soviet era hand grenade featuring the UDSZ dual action fuse. This allows it to be both a standard fragmentation grenade and an impact grenade The RGO, much like the RGN was designed to work with the RGD-5. The RGO instead is a defensive grenade, featuring an intended lower shell (sic) compared to the RGN's smooth shell.
overview: Rank Required:
